CVE-2018-15587.title: GNOME Evolution through 3.28.2 is prone to OpenPGP signatures bei ...
CVE-2018-15587.description: GNOME Evolution through 3.28.2 is prone to OpenPGP signatures being spoofed for arbitrary messages using a specially crafted email that contains a valid signature from the entity to be impersonated as an attachment.

CVE-2020-11879.title: An issue was discovered in GNOME Evolution before 3.35.91. By usi ...
CVE-2020-11879.description: An issue was discovered in GNOME Evolution before 3.35.91. By using the proprietary (non-RFC6068) "mailto?attach=..." parameter, a website (or other source of mailto links) can make Evolution attach local files or directories to a composed email message without showing a warning to the user, as demonstrated by an attach=. value.
